summary: Added a maintained XCUITest smoke proving one seeded active Home-protocol-run-backed Continue row routes from Today into the Home active run sheet.

contract_status_changes.contract: Continue active Home protocol run routing UI smoke
contract_status_changes.before: The maintained XCUITest smoke proved seeded Focus and Home-task-backed Continue rows, but did not prove tapping an active Home-protocol-run-backed row presented its run sheet.
contract_status_changes.after: The maintained XCUITest smoke proves one seeded active Home-protocol-run-backed Continue row routes from Today into Home and presents the active run sheet.

contract_status_changes.contract: Deterministic active protocol run UI fixture
contract_status_changes.before: UI test seeding covered fresh day, Focus-backed Continue, and Home-task-backed Continue fixtures.
contract_status_changes.after: A debug-only seed flag writes one protocol template and one active run so the active protocol route can be proved through visible UI.

contract_status_changes.before: Home could present active run sheets, but the focused UI smoke did not have a stable sheet sentinel for active protocol runs.
contract_status_changes.after: Home exposes `home.protocolRun.item.<uuid>` and `home.protocolRun.sheet.<uuid>` identifiers for deterministic active run routing smoke.

contract_status_changes.before: The docs described deterministic UI smoke coverage for Today launch, seeded Continue rows, one Focus-backed Done action, and one Home-task-backed route.
contract_status_changes.after: The docs also describe the maintained active Home-protocol-run-backed Continue route smoke while keeping the proof claim limited to focused XCUITest smoke.

residual_risks: This remains focused XCUITest smoke coverage, not a broad UI regression suite.
Only one active Home-protocol-run-backed Continue route is proven; every Continue source, a broad routing matrix, screenshots, device behavior, and TestFlight behavior remain unproven.
No repo-managed screenshots were preserved, so screenshot-verified proof is not claimed.
recommended_next_reason: Clean stop is valid. If more UI harness depth is needed later, choose one narrow proof such as Write-note-backed Continue routing or another explicit Continue action, rather than broadening into a regression suite.
